creator: farrokhi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #1)

portscout hadn't picked it up yet because it was released a few minutes ago [1]. I was in contact with upstream developer to resolve a few issues around python 3.7 compatibility. I tested it on my local 12-CURRENT dev host. It also also now being tested in poudriere 10/11/12 amd64. I will post an update here when poudriere tasks are finished.

[1] https://github.com/chtd/psycopg2cffi#july-2018
